name: Git Review Workbench
description: Safe Git graph and review workbench for CodeSurf. Compares branches, summarizes changed-file graphs, generates review handoff markdown, and exposes MCP-readable git state.
author: contex

actions.name: getGitState
actions.description: Return current branch, upstream/ahead-behind, working-tree status, recent history, compare summary, and changed-file graph. Params: { workspacePath: string, baseRef?: string, headRef?: string }

actions.name: compareBranches
actions.description: Compare two refs without switching branches. Params: { workspacePath: string, baseRef: string, headRef?: string }

actions.name: getChangedFileGraph
actions.description: Return graph nodes/edges for files changed between refs. Params: { workspacePath: string, baseRef: string, headRef?: string }

actions.name: generateReviewHandoff
actions.description: Generate markdown review handoff without writing files. Params: { workspacePath: string, baseRef?: string, headRef?: string }

actions.name: writeReviewHandoff
actions.description: Write review handoff markdown under .codesurf/reviews. Params: { workspacePath: string, baseRef?: string, headRef?: string }

actions.name: getFileDiff
actions.description: Return bounded diff for a file between refs. Params: { workspacePath: string, path: string, baseRef?: string, headRef?: string }

mcpTools.name: git_state
mcpTools.description: Return MCP-readable git state, status, recent commits, branch compare, and changed-file graph. Params: { workspacePath: string, baseRef?: string, headRef?: string }

mcpTools.name: branch_compare
mcpTools.description: Compare refs and return changed files/commits without changing checkout. Params: { workspacePath: string, baseRef: string, headRef?: string }

mcpTools.name: changed_file_graph
mcpTools.description: Return markdown summary of changed-file graph for a ref comparison. Params: { workspacePath: string, baseRef: string, headRef?: string }

mcpTools.name: review_handoff
mcpTools.description: Return markdown review handoff for a branch/ref comparison. Params: { workspacePath: string, baseRef?: string, headRef?: string }

mcpTools.name: file_diff
mcpTools.description: Return a bounded diff for one file between refs. Params: { workspacePath: string, path: string, baseRef?: string, headRef?: string }
